concerns.text: FR-009 requires 'generate metric selection guidance output mapping dataset characteristics to recommended fairness metrics based on correlation analysis results.' The plan.md, research.md, quickstart.md, and data-model.md do not contain any explicit task, phase, or output artifact for generating this guidance. Quickstart Step 6 (Regression Analysis) and Step 7 (Bootstrap Analysis) produce regression_results.csv and bootstrap_results.csv, but no guidance output is specified. This FR is silent under-planning.
